name: mtrense-skills
description: Workflow-family plugins for Claude Code: milestone-driven build, research knowledge bases, codebase surveys, and shared utilities.

plugins.name: milestone-driven
plugins.description: Four-phase milestone-driven build cycle: strategic planning, milestone breakdown, TDD task implementation, and milestone closing.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Multi-phase research workflow for building cited, audited knowledge bases.

plugins.name: codebase-survey
plugins.description: Bootstraps and maintains an AI-consumable map of an existing codebase with per-module CODEBASE.md and derived CLAUDE.md rules.

plugins.name: synaptic-authoring
plugins.description: Authoring workflow for Synaptic interactive-learning tracks: grounded ingestion, prerequisite-DAG structuring, node/question drafting, gap auditing, and CLI integrity gating.

plugins.name: domain-driven
plugins.description: Domain-driven build workflow: vision grounding, EventStorming, bounded-context mapping, and a dependency-ordered task backlog driven to done by TDD workers.
